title: User Input 🎤⌨️💬
short_description: Programs become interactive when they listen to users. Learn input() to make your code talk to humans and respond.

title: Mini Project 🎯💻🧩
short_description: Combine everything from Week 1 into one real program. Variables + Input + Conditions + Loops working together.

title: How Computers Think
short_description: Understand how computers follow instructions and why this matters for AI builders.

title: DAY 2 — VARIABLES 📦🐍
short_description: Variables store information for your program.

title: Data Types 🏺💰🌡️💡
short_description: Different data needs different containers. String (text), Integer (whole numbers), Float (decimals), Boolean (True/False). Choose the right type or code breaks.

title: Conditions ⚡🤔🚦
short_description: Code can make decisions using if statements. Programs evaluate TRUE/FALSE conditions and choose what to do. This is how apps respond differently to different situations.

title: Loops 🔁⚡♾️
short_description: Loops let computers repeat tasks automatically. No more copy-pasting code. Write it once, run it 1000 times.

title: Functions 🏭⚡🔧
short_description: Write code once, use it forever. Functions are reusable machines that do your work on command!

title: Function Inputs & Outputs 📥📤⚙️
short_description: Make functions smarter by sending data in and getting results back. This is how functions become truly powerful!

title: Lists 📋📦🚂
short_description: One variable that stores many values. Like a train with many compartments!

title: List Operations ✏️➕➖🛒
short_description: Lists can grow, shrink and change. Add, remove and update items just like a shopping cart!

title: List Loops 🔁📋🤖
short_description: Loop through every item in a list automatically. No item gets skipped!

title: Dictionaries 📖🔑🗂️
short_description: Store data as key-value pairs. Like a contact book — search by name, get their number instantly!

title: Strings 💬🔤✏️
short_description: Strings are how programs handle text. Every chat, search and message in every app is a string!

title: String Operations ✂️🔗🧱
short_description: Transform and combine text like LEGO blocks. Build bigger messages from smaller pieces!

title: Tuples 🔒📦🛡️
short_description: Tuples store data that should never change. Like a sealed locker — you can read it but never edit it!

title: Sets 🎯🔄⭐
short_description: Sets automatically remove duplicates. Only unique values survive — like a VIP guest list with no repeats!

title: Nested Data Structures 🏠📦🔗
short_description: Data inside data! Like a house with rooms with cupboards — access anything layer by layer!

title: File Handling 📁💾📝
short_description: Save data permanently so it survives after your program closes. Like writing in a notebook you can read anytime!

title: Error Handling 🛡️⚠️🔧
short_description: Stop your program from crashing! Handle problems gracefully so the app keeps running no matter what.

title: Day 1 — Setup Your Environment
short_description: Set up Python, VS Code, virtual environments, and required libraries to prepare your AI Agent development environment.
